zh.Ghistelles: 比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan V van Ghistelles於1310年出生在比利時福拉安德倫時，他的父親Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles24歲，母親Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN5歲。他和Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes至少有7個兒子和9個女兒。他去世於1362年在法國瑟-吉馬內米奧可雷希-拉-查阿培勒享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan V van Ghistelles于1310年出生在比利时福拉安德倫时，他的父亲Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles24岁，母亲Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN5岁。他和Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes至少有7个儿子和9个女儿。他去世于1362年在法国瑟-吉馬內米奧可雷希-拉-查阿培勒享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jan V van Ghistelles was born in 1310, in Flanders, Belgium, his father, Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles, was 24 and his mother, Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN, was 5. He had at least 7 sons and 9 daughters with Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes. He died in 1362, in Crécy-la-Chapelle, Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan V van Ghistelles est né en 1310, à Flandre, Belgique, son père, Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN, avait 5 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles avec Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes. Il est décédé en 1362, à Crécy-la-Chapelle, Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan V van Ghistelles 1310 in Vlaanderen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles 24 und seine Mutter Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN 5. Er hatte mit Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes mindestens 7 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Crécy-la-Chapelle, Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan V van Ghistelles è nato il nel 1310 nel Vlaanderen, Belgio, il suo padre, Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN, aveva 5 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie con Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes. Morì nel 1362, nel Crécy-la-Chapelle, Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan V van Ghistellesが1310年にベルギーvラアンデレンで生まれた時，父Chevalier Jean De Ghistellesは24歳，母Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETENは5歳であった。彼はIsabelle Jeanne de Rodesとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘をもうけた。彼は1362年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメアウックスクルeシ-ラ-チャペルで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan V van Ghistelles(이)가 1310년 벨기에 블라아더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN(은)는 5세였다. 그는 Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1362년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 모스 크e시-라-차펠일에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan V van Ghistelles nasceu em 1310, em Vlaanderen, Bélgica, seu pai, Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN, tinha 5 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas com Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes. Ele faleceu em 1362, em Crécy-la-Chapelle, Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan V van Ghistelles родился в 1310 г. в местности влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN, 5. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей от Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности крeси-ла-чапелл, мокс, сине-ет-марн, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan V van Ghistelles nació en 1310, en Vlaanderen, Bélgica, su papá, Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Marie Marguerite DE HAVERSKERQUE-DE STRAETEN, tenía 5 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas con Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes. Murió en 1362, en Crécy-la-Chapelle, Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
